name: read-it-later
title: Read It Later
description: Browse, search and save articles from your read-it-later library.
author: plutotom

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your read-it-later API key. Create one in the app's settings.

commands.name: library
commands.title: Library
commands.subtitle: Read It Later
commands.description: Search and manage your saved articles.

commands.name: add-article
commands.title: Add to Library
commands.subtitle: Read It Later
commands.description: Save a URL or manual text entry to your library.

tools.name: search-articles
tools.title: Search Articles
tools.description: List the most recent articles in the user's read-it-later library, or search them by keyword. Returns article metadata (id, title, url, excerpt, tags, read/favorite/archived status, reading time). Use this to answer questions like "my 5 most recent articles" or to find the articles to operate on.

tools.name: get-article-content
tools.title: Get Article Content
tools.description: Fetch the full readable text of a single article by its id. Use this to read an article before summarizing it or deciding appropriate tags.

tools.name: list-tags
tools.title: List Tags
tools.description: List the tags already used across the user's library, with article counts. Use this before tagging so new tags stay consistent with existing ones.

tools.name: update-article
tools.title: Update Article
tools.description: Update an article by id: set its tags, or change favorite/read/archived status, title, or folder. Use this to apply tags after reading an article. Setting tags replaces the article's existing tags.

tools.name: add-article
tools.title: Add Article
tools.description: Save a new article to the library from a URL (the page is fetched and parsed) or as a manual text entry (title + content). Optionally apply tags.
